name: Tortilla Stack/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble one-fourth of ground beef into the bottom of a slow cooker.
2. Top with one-fourth of tortilla wedges.
3. In a small bowl, combine soup and taco seasoning mix.
4. Spread one-fourth of the soup mixture over the tortillas in the pot.
5. Sprinkle with one-fourth of tomatoes.
6. Repeat layering until all ingredients are used in the pot.
7. Cover and cook on LOW for 4-5 hours.
8. Spoon onto individual plates.
9. Top each serving with sour cream, shredded lettuce, green onions, bell pepper, and avocado.
